description: UI layer, screens, HUD, scoring, timer, and win animations. This adds the complete user interface with menus, overlays, in-game HUD, scoring system, undo button, timer for Hard mode, and the win celebration with flying/cascading cards.
steps: Create src/config/scoring.js - point values: waste-to-tableau 5pts, waste-to-foundation 10pts, tableau-to-foundation 10pts, turn card face up 5pts, foundation-to-tableau -15pts, undo penalty -20pts

Create src/ui/hud.js - in-game HUD rendered on canvas: score display, move counter, timer (for Hard mode countdown), undo button, new game button, menu button. All interactive elements have hover/press states and audio feedback. Responsive positioning for all screen sizes.

Create src/ui/screens.js - all game screens rendered on canvas overlays: (1) Main Menu with New Game, Continue, Daily Challenge, Settings, Statistics buttons. (2) Mode Select: Easy (draw-1 untimed) / Hard (draw-3 + countdown timer). (3) Settings: sound toggle, card back theme selector, draw mode preference. (4) Statistics: games played/won, win percentage, best time, current streak, longest streak. (5) Pause overlay with Resume/Restart/Quit. (6) Win screen with stats and play again. (7) Game Over (timer expired in Hard mode). Each screen has enter/exit animations.
Wire scoring into game.js - track score per move, display in HUD, apply undo penalty, show score change animations (floating +/- numbers)
Implement Hard mode timer - countdown from 10 minutes, display in HUD, game over when timer expires, timer pause when game paused

Create win animation in game.js - when game won: cards fly off foundations in cascading pattern with physics (gravity + random velocity), bounce off screen edges, particle trail effects. Plays win sound. Shows final score and time.
Add card flip animation - cards animate rotation when flipped face-up (scale X from 1 to 0 to 1 with face changing at midpoint)
Add move animations - cards animate smoothly to target positions using easing, not instant teleport
Add auto-complete button - appears when game detects all remaining moves are trivial (all cards face-up), animates remaining cards to foundations automatically

First-run coach marks - on first game ever, show 3-4 brief tooltip overlays explaining: drag cards, build tableau in alternating colors, goal is foundations Ace-to-King. Dismissable, never shown again.
acceptance_criteria: All menu screens render correctly and are navigable
Every button has visual feedback (hover/press state) and audio click sound
Score updates correctly per the scoring rules on every valid move
Undo works (single undo) and deducts points
Hard mode timer counts down and triggers game over at zero
Win animation plays cascading flying cards when game is won
Card flip and move animations are smooth
Auto-complete detects eligible state and works when triggered
Coach marks appear on first run only
All screens are exitable - no dead ends in navigation
verification: node tests/selftest.mjs passes scoring logic tests
Manual verification: navigate all menu screens, play a game, trigger win animation
